oneLiner: A live event companion game that imports agenda text, recommends a personalized route, verifies session attendance, counts attendee connections by code, and turns proof into AI-credit reward claim requests.
targetUsers: AI/data/backend practitioners choosing between parallel talks
Hackathon participants trying to preserve energy
Event organizers who want a lightweight engagement layer

userFocus: event URL and pasted agenda import controls
CSV, .ics calendar, and manual session import paths
goal, energy, social mode, venue preference, and break controls
presets for beginners, AI builders, backend engineers, and hallway-track users
AI-credit-style reward claim requests based on mixed proof
experienceValue: Reward Wallet with AI-credit-style claim tickets
technicalExecution: Python stdlib best-effort website import endpoint

demoVideo.description: Captioned walkthrough covering agenda import, planning, room-code verification, buddy-code connection, Reward Wallet AI-credit claim request, and venue guidance.

knownLimitations: The built-in sample schedule is curated from the public PyConSG schedule page rather than automatically synced.
Website URL importing is best effort and depends on page format, public accessibility, and whether the schedule text is visible in the HTML.
PDF/image upload is currently an OCR placeholder and needs a later OCR or AI extraction API.
Calendar export is not implemented yet.
